From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Mexican footballer (born 2003)

In this [Spanish name](/wiki/Spanish_name "Spanish name"), the first or paternal [surname](/wiki/Surname "Surname") is  *Llanas* and the second or maternal family name is  *Valdez*.

**Aldo Emmanuel Llanas Valdez** (born 7 February 2003) is a Mexican professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as an [attacking midfielder](/wiki/Midfielder#Attacking_midfielder "Midfielder") for fourth-tier [Liga TDP](/wiki/Liga_TDP "Liga TDP") club [Cadereyta](/w/index.php?title=C.F._Cadereyta&action=edit&redlink=1 "C.F. Cadereyta (page does not exist)").
